system.description:
What it does (SRD): On a successful grapple check, the creature deals extra bludgeoning damage (the amount is given in the creature’s stat block). Constrict usually requires a successful grapple after a grab-capable attack.

ThirdEra: Leave Mechanical effects and Capability grants empty here; enter the printed constriction damage and any special rules in the NPC’s Description or natural attack notes so it matches the SRD stat block.
